Soma had his body cut into two by Shtva~ Trident and hence he
i$ called Shagnatma. At length Brahma interposed and stopped the
fight, compelling Soma to restore Tara to her husband. The result of
this intrigiJe was the birth of a child whom Tara after great persuasion
declared rto be the son of Soma. and to whom the name of Buddha
was given. Though there is no enemy to Moon but Mercury regards the
Moon as his enemy as Saturn regards his father Sun as enemy.
